name: hadf-phase2bis-replication
primary_metric: silhouette score at k=5 across all 11 endpoints (replicates Phase 2 baseline)
success_metrics: Sub-exp 1: silhouette ≥ 0.5 with cluster count ≥ 3 across 9 cloud endpoints
Sub-exp 2: Ollama distribution KS-distinguishable from cloud endpoints (p < 0.01)
Sub-exp 3: Bedrock haiku-4-5 fingerprint distinguishable from Anthropic-direct haiku-4-5 (signature delta > Sub-exp 1 within-provider variance)
kill_criteria: n_valid < 600 per sub-exp (yield too low for silhouette computation)
All endpoints simultaneously rate-limited > 2 fires consecutively
ANY endpoint changes streaming protocol or model id mid-collection
kill_criteria_resolution: No kill criterion tripped across any sub-exp. All yield floors cleared; Sub-exp 3 anchor drift 0.19sigma << 2sigma kill; signature_delta_ratio 2.89 > 1.0 (not refuted) and > 2.0 (confirmed). HADF dispatch premise CONFIRMED on all axes (1: silhouette 0.70; 2: KS p<<0.01; 3: delta 2.89; 1B: silhouette 0.98).

external_audit_schedule.scope: Sub-exps 1-3 raw data integrity + verdict scripts
Block C synthesis case study + ORCHID v2 design stub

related_prs_notes.507: chore — Sub-exp 3 prereg pre-ceremony fill-in (B15.2 prep, awaiting ceremony lock ~2026-06-01+, double-gated on Sub-exp 1+2 PASS)

tasks.title: Block A — Soak window scaffolding (state.json + harness + preflight + verdict scripts + launchd templates + 6 unit test suites + go/no-go ceremony runbook)
tasks.scope_note: A0–A12 (13 sub-tasks, summarized 'Block A — 12 tasks' in PR title) shipped in one PR. Includes wrapper preflight, anchor-drift detection, cost cron, heartbeat audit, verdict script, launchd plist templates, go/no-go ceremony doc, 6 Python test suites + 1 bash test suite all passing. See docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-12-hadf-phase2bis-replication.md §'BLOCK A — Soak Window Scaffolding' for the sub-task breakdown.
